# Environment maps & Tank Farm materials

## HDRI
- `tankfarm_1k.hdr` — [Abandoned Tank Farm 03](https://polyhaven.com/a/abandoned_tank_farm_03) from Poly Haven (CC0), 1k runtime
- `tankfarm_4k.exr` — same asset at 4k (optional / archival)

## PBR textures (`public/textures/tankfarm/`, 1k)
- [Rusty Metal](https://polyhaven.com/a/rusty_metal) (CC0)
- [Metal Plate](https://polyhaven.com/a/metal_plate) (CC0)
- [Asphalt 02](https://polyhaven.com/a/asphalt_02) (CC0)
